1793340.name: Under The Warehouse
1793340.description:
In any particular city, a large building made of brick and concrete is full of people moving boxes in, out, and around. A never-ending stream of trucks come and go, documents get received and delivered. A mysterious caller asks to meet. They need an egg. It's Under The Warehouse.

Featuring:
  • Collect items and solve puzzles
  • Talk with the workers
  • Explore a large, surreal complex
  • Retro and nostalgic pixelated graphics
  • Try to solve the mystery of The Warehouse
  • Discover 4 Different Endings
  • Frog

If you have trouble playing the game, please try running as administrator.
1793340.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
